mapper.select: SELECT sa.session_id AS sessionId, sa.user_id AS userId, u.gender AS gender, u.level AS level FROM session_applications sa JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.session_id = #{sessionId} AND sa.status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY u.level ASC, u.gender ASC, sa.user_id ASC;

SELECT A.SESSION_ID AS sessionId, A.ROUND_NO AS roundNo, A.TABLE_NO AS tableNo, U.ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.NICKNAME AS nickname, U.EMAIL AS email, U.LEVEL as level FROM TABLE_ASSIGNMENTS A INNER JOIN USERS U ON A.USER_ID = U.ID WHERE A.SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} ORDER BY A.ROUND_NO ASC, A.TABLE_NO ASC, U.ID ASC
SELECT id, session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, table_no AS tableNo, created_at AS createdAt FROM table_assignments WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM session_applications sa WHERE sa.session_id = #{sessionId} AND sa.status = 'CONFIRMED'

SELECT s.session_id AS sessionId, s.user_id AS userId, NULL AS s1GroupId, u.gender AS gender, u.level AS level FROM session_applications s INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND s.session_id = #{sessionId} AND s.status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY u.level ASC, u.gender ASC, s.user_id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO table_assignments (session_id, user_id, table_no, created_at, round_no, s1_group_id) VALUES
(#{r.sessionId}, #{r.userId}, #{r.tableNo}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{r.roundNo}, #{r.s1GroupId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.level AS level, u.gender AS gender, COUNT(*) AS count FROM session_applications sa JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.session_id = #{sessionId} AND sa.status = 'CONFIRMED' GROUP BY u.level, u.gender ORDER BY u.level DESC, u.gender ASC
